info.title: Record API
info.description: API documentation for Record Vizsga project

get.summary: Get the Record on a given id
Get the Artists on a given id

delete.summary: Deletes the Artist on the given Id
delete.description: Completley removes the Artist and all of its links from the database. Only avaiable to Admins.

401.description: No Token provided / Not admin user

500.description: Artist found, but server failed to delete the file

get.summary: Get the Record with the given type
Return a given Records All Artists
Return a given Artist All Records

422.description: The request was received but its content contained errors!
The request was received but its content contained errors!

recordFile.description: JPG only, 1:1 ratio, max 1280px. Replaces existing file.

delete.summary: Deletes the Record on the given Id
delete.description: Completley removes the Record and all of its links from the database. Only avaiable to Admins.

401.description: No Token provided / Not admin user

500.description: Record found, but server failed to delete the file

post.summary: Links an Artist to a Record

422.description: The request was recieved but its content contained errors!

500.description: The request was recieved but the serve failde to link the records!

post.summary: Adds a new entry to the Queue

payload.description: JSON encoded object. Structure depends on `type`.

get.description: Returns all requests with status "pending". Requires authentication.

data.description: Payload data. Structure depends on type.

get.summary: Returns a request with the provided id
Returns requests with the provided user id
get.description: Users are only allowed to view their own Requests

patch.description: Accepts a pending request and inserts its payload into the relevant table (records or artists). Only available to Admins.

parameters.name: requestId
parameters.description: The ID of the request to accept

200.description: Request accepted and payload inserted into the database

409.description: Request has already been accepted or rejected

patch.description: Rejects a pending request. The request will no longer appear in the pending list. Only available to Admins.

parameters.name: requestId
parameters.description: The ID of the request to reject

409.description: Request has already been accepted or rejected

post.summary: Checks if the recieved name and password matches a database record with the same name and hashed password.

200.description: Username and password matched a record! API Token generated and granted!

403.description: User has been found but password didnt match!

422.description: The request was recieved but its content contained errors!

post.summary: Creates a new Record in the database with the provided details.

422.description: The request was recieved but its content contained errors!

post.summary: Deletes the Users API Token from the database
post.description: Doesnt delete the actual Users account from the database

401.description: The request and its contents was recieved but the token was either missing or it was invalid!

500.description: The request and its contents was recieved but the server failed to delete the token!

delete.description: Completley removes the Users Account from the database. Requires User API Token

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The ID of the user to delete

401.description: No Token Provided / Not Admin User

post.description: If called with a pair that already exits it deletes that link. (Unfavourites the Record.)

422.description: The request was recieved but its content contained errors!

500.description: The request was recieved but the serve failde to link the records!

get.summary: Returns all favourited record IDs for a given user
Returns all favourited records for a given user

get.description: Returns all Users, only avaible to Admins.
